claims: Defines ExtractedPhysicalDetectorWitness as a finite arithmetic witness object.
Defines extractPhysicalDetectorWitness from PhysicalFieldData and FiniteDetectorPartition.
Proves extracted active mass equals finite sampled total energy.
Proves extracted sample count equals finite support size.
Proves extracted detector-cell count equals partition cell count.
Proves extracted detector-id length equals detector-cell count.
Proves extracted active mass is nonnegative.
Proves the empty-data extracted active mass is zero.
